headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Charles Schwab (SCHW) After Its 29% One Year Rally?
summary: Wondering whether Charles Schwab is still priced sensibly after a strong run, or if expectations have run ahead of reality? This article walks through what the current share price might be implying about future value. Schwab last closed at US$95.23, with a flat 7 day return of 0.0%, a 30 day return of a 9.4% decline, a year to date return of a 6.2% decline, a 1 year return of 29.2%, and a 3 year return of 69.5% that sits above its 50.3% return over 5 years.
